title: Online Customer Service 在线客服
scene: 顾客咨询在线客服关于订单问题

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: Hi, my order was supposed to arrive yesterday, but I have not received it yet.
lines.trans: 你好，我的订单昨天就该到了，但我还没收到。

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.line: I am sorry for the delay. May I have your order number to check the status?
lines.trans: 很抱歉延误了。请提供订单号，我帮您查一下状态。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: It is 559320. I also got a message saying it was shipped, but no tracking updates.
lines.trans: 订单号是559320。我还收到消息说已发货，但没有物流更新。

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.line: Let me check. It seems the package is stuck at the local sorting center due to bad weather.
lines.trans: 让我查一下。包裹似乎因为恶劣天气滞留在当地分拣中心了。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: When do you think it will be delivered? I need it for a trip this weekend.
lines.trans: 你觉得什么时候能送到？我这周末旅行要用。

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.line: It should be delivered by Friday at the latest. I will also add a priority note to your order.
lines.trans: 最晚周五应该能送到。我还会给您的订单加急处理。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: That would be helpful. If it is late, can I get a refund?
lines.trans: 那太好了。如果还是晚了，我能退款吗？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.line: If it arrives after Friday, we will refund the shipping fee and offer a ten percent discount on your next order.
lines.trans: 如果周五之后送达，我们会退还运费，并给您的下一单打九折。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: That sounds fair. I will wait until Friday then. Thank you.
lines.trans: 听起来合理。那我就等到周五。谢谢。
